#+TITLE: init.org
Source of truth for Emacs configuration — =init.el= and =early-init.el= are auto-generated from this file via org-babel-tangle.
#+PROPERTY: header-args:emacs-lisp :tangle init.el :results silent
#+PROPERTY: header-args:elisp :tangle init.el :results silent

* early-init.el
** Header
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :tangle early-init.el
;;; early-init.el --- The Early Init File -*- lexical-binding: t -*-

;;; Commentary:
;; This file is auto-generated from init.org.
;; Do not edit this file manually.
;; https://www.gnu.org/software/emacs/manual/html_node/emacs/Early-Init-File.html
;; https://emacs-jp.github.io/tips/startup-optimization

;;; Code:
#+end_src

** Profiler
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :tangle early-init.el
;; (require 'profiler)
;; (profiler-start 'cpu)
#+end_src

** Exec PATH
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :tangle early-init.el
;; workaround:
;; https://github.com/d12frosted/homebrew-emacs-plus/issues/733
(let* ((cache-file (locate-user-emacs-file ".cache/exec-path"))
       (cached-path (when (file-exists-p cache-file)
                      (with-temp-buffer
                        (insert-file-contents cache-file)
                        (buffer-string))))
       (shell-path (if (and cached-path (> (length cached-path) 0))
                       cached-path
                     (replace-regexp-in-string
                      "[ \t\n\r]+\\'" ""
                      (shell-command-to-string "echo $PATH")))))
  (when (and (not (file-exists-p cache-file))
             (> (length shell-path) 0))
    (make-directory (file-name-directory cache-file) t)
    (with-temp-file cache-file
      (insert shell-path)))
  (when (> (length shell-path) 0)
    (setenv "PATH" shell-path)
    (setq exec-path (split-string shell-path path-separator))))
#+end_src

** GC
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :tangle early-init.el
;; Do not run GC during startup process
;; Must be restored to original at the end of init.el
(setq gc-cons-threshold most-positive-fixnum)
#+end_src

** Package Startup
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :tangle early-init.el
;; Do not automatically load packages when Emacs starts
(setq package-enable-at-startup nil)
;; Prefer quickstart cache when available.
(defvar package-quickstart)
(setq package-quickstart t)
#+end_src

** Frame Defaults
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :tangle early-init.el
(push '(menu-bar-lines . 0) default-frame-alist)
(push '(tool-bar-lines . 0) default-frame-alist)
(push '(ns-transparent-titlebar . t) default-frame-alist)
(push '(vertical-scroll-bars . nil) default-frame-alist)
(setq-default mode-line-format nil)
#+end_src

** Startup Screen
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :tangle early-init.el
;; Jump directly to editor, skip splash screen
(setq inhibit-splash-screen t)
(setq inhibit-startup-message t)
#+end_src

** Frame Resize
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :tangle early-init.el
;; https://www.gnu.org/software/emacs/manual/html_node/elisp/Implied-Frame-Resizing.html
(setq frame-inhibit-implied-resize t)
#+end_src

** LSP Performance
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :tangle early-init.el
;; Use plists for deserialization
;; https://emacs-lsp.github.io/lsp-mode/page/performance/#use-plists-for-deserialization
(setenv "LSP_USE_PLISTS" "true")

** Files
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
;; Redirect auto-save files (#file#) to a dedicated directory
(let ((auto-save-dir (expand-file-name "auto-saves/" user-emacs-directory)))
  (unless (file-exists-p auto-save-dir)
    (make-directory auto-save-dir t))
  (setq auto-save-file-name-transforms
        `((".*" ,auto-save-dir t))))

#+end_src

** use-package
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(eval-and-compile
  (customize-set-variable
   'package-archives '(("org" . "https://orgmode.org/elpa/")
                       ("melpa" . "https://melpa.org/packages/")
                       ("gnu" . "https://elpa.gnu.org/packages/")))
  (package-initialize)
  (unless (package-installed-p 'use-package)
    (package-refresh-contents)
    (package-install 'use-package))
  (require 'use-package))

(use-package hydra
  :ensure t
  :defer t)

(use-package blackout
  :ensure t)
#+end_src

** faces:
*** dashboard
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package dashboard
  :ensure t
  :if (< (length command-line-args) 2)
  :init
  (dashboard-setup-startup-hook)
  :custom
  ;; Value can be
  ;; 'official: which displays the official emacs logo
  ;; 'logo:     which displays an alternative emacs logo
  ;; 1, 2 or 3: which displays one of the text banners
  ;; "path/to/your/image.png" which displays whatever image you would prefer
  (dashboard-startup-banner 'logo)
  (dashboard-set-heading-icons t)
  (dashboard-set-file-icons t)
  (dashboard-center-content t)
  (dashboard-vertically-center-content t)
  (dashboard-items '((projects . 5)
                       (recents . 5)))
  (dashboard-projects-switch-function #'magit-status)
  (initial-buffer-choice #'dashboard-open))
#+end_src

**** which-key
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package which-key
    :ensure t
    :blackout t
    :hook (after-init . which-key-mode)
    :bind (:map which-key-mode-map
                ("C-x TAB" . which-key-C-h-dispatch))
    :custom
    ;; Set the time delay (in seconds) for the which-key popup to appear. A value of
    ;; zero might cause issues so a non-zero value is recommended.
    (which-key-idle-delay 0.3))
#+end_src

  :init
  (defvar select-enable-clipboard)
  (defvar auto-save-draft)
  (defvar show-trailing-whitespace)
  (setq select-enable-clipboard t)
  (setq scroll-bar-mode nil)
  (setq truncate-lines t)

*** clipboard
Ensure macOS clipboard sync works for terminal frames created by emacsclient.
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(defun my/pbcopy (text &optional _push)
  (let ((process-connection-type nil))
    (let ((proc (start-process "pbcopy" nil "pbcopy")))
      (process-send-string proc text)
      (process-send-eof proc))))

(defun my/pbpaste ()
  (shell-command-to-string "pbpaste"))

(defun my/setup-clipboard-for-terminal (frame)
  (when (and (eq system-type 'darwin)
             (not (display-graphic-p frame)))
    (setq select-enable-clipboard t
          select-enable-primary t
          save-interprogram-paste-before-kill t
          interprogram-cut-function #'my/pbcopy
          interprogram-paste-function #'my/pbpaste)))

(when (eq system-type 'darwin)
  (add-hook 'after-make-frame-functions #'my/setup-clipboard-for-terminal)
  (my/setup-clipboard-for-terminal (selected-frame)))
#+end_src

#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package files
  :hook (before-save-hook . delete-trailing-whitespace)
  :custom
  (make-backup-files nil)
  (backup-inhibited nil))

(when (and (memq window-system '(ns nil))
           (fboundp 'mac-get-current-input-source))
  (when (version< "27.0" emacs-version)
    ;; Required for some cases when auto detection is failed or the locale is "en".
    (custom-set-variables
     '(mac-default-input-source "com.google.inputmethod.Japanese.base")))
  ;; supress `'Warning: the function ‘mac-input-method-mode’ is not known to be defined.`'
  (declare-function mac-input-method-mode "mac-input-method-mode")
  (mac-input-method-mode 1))

(use-package cus-edit
  :custom `((custom-file . ,(locate-user-emacs-file "custom.el"))))

(use-package autorevert
  :custom (auto-revert-interval 1.0)
  :hook (after-init . global-auto-revert-mode))

(use-package delsel
  :hook (after-init . delete-selection-mode))

(use-package paren
  :hook (after-init . show-paren-mode))

(use-package elec-pair
  :hook (after-init . electric-pair-mode)
  :custom
  (electric-pair-delete-adjacent-pairs t))

(use-package simple
  :custom
  ;; do not show line numbers in the mode line
  (line-number-mode nil)
  ;; do not show column numbers in the mode line
  (column-number-mode nil))

(use-package eldoc
  :blackout t
  :defer t)

(use-package savehist
  :hook (after-init . savehist-mode)
  :custom
  (savehist-additional-variables '(search-ring regexp-search-ring)))

(use-package saveplace
  :hook (after-init . save-place-mode))
#+end_src

(use-package dired
  :preface
  (declare-function dired-hide-details-mode "dired")
  (defun struuuuggle/setup-dired nil
    "Hide permissions"
    (dired-hide-details-mode 1))
  :hook (dired-mode . struuuuggle/setup-dired)
  :custom
  ;; human-readable file sizes
  ;; (dired-listing-switches . "-lha")
  ;; Automatically revert Dired buffers on revisiting their directory.

  ;; Make dired always use the same buffer
  (dired-kill-when-opening-new-dired-buffer t))

** theme
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package doom-themes
  :ensure t
  :config
  (load-theme 'doom-dracula t)
  (doom-themes-org-config)
  (with-eval-after-load 'treemacs (doom-themes-treemacs-config))
  (custom-set-faces
   `(default				((t :background ,(doom-color 'base1))))
   `(dired-directory			((t :foreground ,(doom-color 'cyan))))
   `(line-number			((t :height 0.7 :foreground ,(doom-color 'grey))))
   `(line-number-current-line 	((t :height 0.7 :foreground ,(doom-color 'green))))
   `(font-lock-comment-face		((t :foreground ,(doom-color 'doc-comments))))
   `(org-block-begin-line		((t :background ,(doom-color 'base2) :foreground ,(doom-color 'doc-comments))))
   `(org-block			((t :background ,(doom-color 'base2) :foreground ,(doom-color 'fg-alt))))
   `(org-block-end-line		((t :background ,(doom-color 'base2))))
   `(tab-bar-tab			((t :background ,(doom-color 'base6) :foreground ,(doom-color 'bg-alt) :weight bold))) ;; active tab
   `(tab-bar-tab-inactive		((t :background ,(doom-color 'base1)))))
  (set-face-foreground 'vertical-border (doom-color 'base5))
  (set-cursor-color (doom-color 'green))
  :custom
  (doom-themes-padded-modeline t)
  (doom-modeline-project-name t))
#+end_src

*** CUI
Use a box-drawing glyph for vertical splits in terminal Emacs.
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(when (not (display-graphic-p))
  (setq standard-display-table (or standard-display-table (make-display-table)))
  (set-display-table-slot standard-display-table 'vertical-border ?\u2502))
#+end_src

Force box-drawing and block-element characters to single-width so that
TUI applications (e.g. Claude Code) render continuous borders inside
vterm.

The range U+2500–U+259F covers two Unicode blocks:
- U+2500–U+257F  Box Drawing        (─ │ ┌ ┐ └ ┘ ├ ┤ ┬ ┴ ┼ …)
- U+2580–U+259F  Block Elements     (▀ ▄ █ ▌ ▐ ░ ▒ ▓ …)

Emacs may calculate a different display width for these glyphs than
what the font actually renders, causing visible gaps in horizontal and
vertical rules.  Pinning them to width 1 resolves the mismatch.
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(set-char-table-range char-width-table '(#x2500 . #x259F) 1)
#+end_src

*** toggle opacity
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(defun struuuuggle/toggle-opacity ()
  "Toggle the opacity of the entire window."
  (interactive)
  (set-frame-parameter nil 'alpha (if (< (if (frame-parameter nil 'alpha) (frame-parameter nil 'alpha) 0) 100) 100 85)))
(global-set-key (kbd "s-u") 'struuuuggle/toggle-opacity)
#+end_src

  :hook (after-init . global-hl-line-mode)

                      :background (doom-blend (doom-color 'green) (doom-color 'bg) 0.15)))

  :hook (after-init . auto-dim-other-buffers-mode)
  :config

  (set-face-attribute 'auto-dim-other-buffers-face nil

** flycheck:
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package flycheck
  :if (version<= "24.3" emacs-version)
  :blackout t
  :ensure t
  :custom (flycheck-elisp-initialize-packages t)
  :hook ((elisp-mode . flycheck-mode)
         (lisp-interaction-mode . flycheck-mode))
  :bind (:map flycheck-mode-map
         ("M-n" . flycheck-next-error)
         ("M-p" . flycheck-previous-error))
  :config
  (use-package flycheck-package
    :ensure t
    :defer t
    :init
    (add-hook 'emacs-lisp-mode-hook
              (lambda () (flycheck-package-setup)) nil t))

  (use-package flycheck-elsa
    :if (version<= "25" emacs-version)
    :ensure t
    :defer t
    :init
    (add-hook 'emacs-lisp-mode-hook
              (lambda () (flycheck-elsa-setup)) nil t)))


#+end_src

** completion:
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package vertico
  :ensure t
  :hook (after-init . vertico-mode)
  :custom
  (vertico-count 20)
  (vertico-cycle t)
  :config
  ;; In find-file, "/" inserts the candidate directory (like TAB)
  (define-key vertico-map (kbd "/")
              (lambda ()
                (interactive)
                (if (and minibuffer-completing-file-name
                         (vertico--candidate)
                         (string-suffix-p "/" (vertico--candidate)))
                    (vertico-insert)
                  (insert "/")))))

(use-package orderless
  :ensure t
  :defer t
  :custom
  (completion-styles '(orderless basic))
  (completion-category-overrides '((file (styles partial-completion)))))

(use-package marginalia
  :ensure t
  :bind (:map minibuffer-local-map
              ("M-A" . marginalia-cycle))
  :hook (after-init . marginalia-mode))

(use-package nerd-icons-completion
  :ensure t
  :after marginalia
  :hook (marginalia-mode . nerd-icons-completion-marginalia-setup))

(use-package consult
  :ensure t
  :bind (("C-s" . consult-line)
         ("C-S-s" . consult-imenu)
         ("C-x C-r" . consult-recent-file)
         ("C-x b" . consult-buffer)
         ("M-g" . consult-goto-line)
         ("M-s" . consult-line-multi)))
#+end_src

** git:
*** magit
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package magit
  :ensure t
  :bind
  (("C-x g" . magit-status)
   :map magit-status-mode-map
   ("w" . magit-worktree))
  :init
  (defvar magit-display-buffer-function)
  :preface
  (declare-function magit-display-buffer-fullframe-status-v1 "magit")
  :config
  ;; disable "--force" option
  (transient-remove-suffix 'magit-push "-F")
  ;; see also: https://magit.vc/manual/magit/Performance.html#Refs-Buffer-Performance-1
  (remove-hook 'magit-status-sections-hook 'magit-insert-tags-header)
  (defun magit-pr-review (&optional range)
    "Review a Pull Request by diffing against the default branch.
If RANGE is not provided, defaults to `origin/main...HEAD`."
    (interactive
     (let* ((default "origin/main...HEAD")
            (input (read-string (format "Diff range (%s): " default))))
       (list (if (string-empty-p input) default input))))
    (magit-diff-range range))
  :custom
  (magit-revision-insert-related-refs nil)
  (magit-display-buffer-function #'magit-display-buffer-fullframe-status-v1))
#+end_src

*** git-gutter
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package git-gutter
  :ensure t
  :hook (after-init . global-git-gutter-mode)
  :custom
  (git-gutter:modified-sign " ")
  (git-gutter:added-sign    " ")
  (git-gutter:deleted-sign  " ")
  :config
  (set-face-attribute 'git-gutter:modified nil :background (doom-color 'yellow))
  (set-face-attribute 'git-gutter:added nil :background (doom-color 'green))
  (set-face-attribute 'git-gutter:deleted nil :background (doom-color 'magenta)))

;; Allow loading symbolic links
(setq vc-follow-symlinks t)

;; Auto-revert buffer when changes are made in VCS of symlink target
;; (setq auto-revert-check-vc-info t)
#+end_src

** font:
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
;; Font width confirmation:
;; 0123456789012345678901234567890123456789
;; 一二三四五六一二三四五六一二三四五六一二三四五六

(set-face-attribute 'default nil :family "Fira Code" :weight 'light :height 140)

(use-package fira-code-mode
  :if window-system
  :blackout t
  :ensure t
  :hook (prog-mode . fira-code-mode)
  :config
  (add-hook 'emacs-startup-hook #'fira-code-mode-set-font)
  :custom
  (fira-code-mode-disabled-ligatures '("[]" "x"))
  (fira-code-mode-enable-hex-literal nil))
#+end_src

** lsp
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package lsp-mode
  :ensure t
  :commands (lsp lsp-deferred)
  :hook
  (swift-mode . lsp-deferred)
  (ruby-mode . lsp-deferred)
  (sh-mode . lsp-deferred)
  :init
  (defvar lsp-disabled-clients)
  (setq lsp-disabled-clients '(rubocop-ls ruby-ls))
  :config
  (use-package lsp-ui
    :ensure t
    :hook (lsp-mode . lsp-ui-mode)
    :preface
    (declare-function lsp-ui-doc--hide-frame "lsp-ui-doc")
    (declare-function lsp-ui-doc-show "lsp-ui-doc")
    (declare-function lsp-ui-doc-mode "lsp-ui-doc")
    (defvar lsp-ui-doc-mode)
    (defun struuuuggle/toggle-lsp-ui-doc ()
      (interactive)
      (if lsp-ui-doc-mode
          (progn
            (lsp-ui-doc-mode -1)
            (lsp-ui-doc--hide-frame))
        (progn
          (lsp-ui-doc-mode 1)
          (lsp-ui-doc-show))))
    :bind
    (("M-s-0" . imenu-list-smart-toggle)
     :map lsp-mode-map
     ("C-j" . struuuuggle/toggle-lsp-ui-doc)
     ("M-RET" . lsp-execute-code-action))
    :custom
    ;; lsp-ui-doc
    (lsp-ui-doc-enable t)
    (lsp-ui-doc-position 'at-point) ;; top, bottom, or at-point
    (lsp-ui-doc-max-width 200) ;; Original value is 150
    (lsp-ui-doc-max-height 30) ;; Original value is 13
    (lsp-ui-doc-use-childframe t)
    (lsp-ui-doc-use-webkit t)
    ;; lsp-ui-flycheck
    (lsp-ui-flycheck-enable nil)
    ;; lsp-ui-imenu
    (lsp-ui-imenu-enable nil)
    (lsp-ui-imenu-kind-position 'top)
    ;; lsp-ui-peek
    (lsp-ui-peek-enable t)
    (lsp-ui-peek-peek-height 30)
    (lsp-ui-peek-list-width 8)
    ;; never, on-demand, or always
    (lsp-ui-peek-fontify 'always))

  (use-package smart-jump
    :ensure t
    :bind
    ("s-b" . smart-jump-go)
    ("M-," . smart-jump-back)))
#+end_src

*** emacs-lsp-booster
https://github.com/blahgeek/emacs-lsp-booster?tab=readme-ov-file#configure-lsp-mode
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(defun lsp-booster--advice-json-parse (old-fn &rest args)
  "Try to parse bytecode instead of json."
  (or
   (when (equal (following-char) ?#)
     (let ((bytecode (read (current-buffer))))
       (when (byte-code-function-p bytecode)
         (funcall bytecode))))
   (apply old-fn args)))
(advice-add (if (fboundp 'json-parse-buffer)
                'json-parse-buffer
              'json-read)
            :around
            #'lsp-booster--advice-json-parse)

(defun lsp-booster--advice-final-command (old-fn cmd &optional test?)
  "Prepend emacs-lsp-booster command to lsp CMD."
  (let ((orig-result (funcall old-fn cmd test?)))
    (if (and (not test?)                             ;; for check lsp-server-present?
             (not (file-remote-p default-directory)) ;; see lsp-resolve-final-command, it would add extra shell wrapper
             lsp-use-plists
             (not (functionp 'json-rpc-connection))  ;; native json-rpc
             (executable-find "emacs-lsp-booster"))
        (progn
          (when-let ((command-from-exec-path (executable-find (car orig-result))))  ;; resolve command from exec-path (in case not found in $PATH)
            (setcar orig-result command-from-exec-path))
          (message "Using emacs-lsp-booster for %s!" orig-result)
          (cons "emacs-lsp-booster" orig-result))
      orig-result)))
(advice-add 'lsp-resolve-final-command :around #'lsp-booster--advice-final-command)
#+end_src

** Languages:
*** General
**** Enable Editorconfig mode
[[https://github.com/editorconfig/editorconfig-emacs/tree/master?tab=readme-ov-file#getting-started][Since EditorConfig is bundled directly with Emacs]], all we have to do is:
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package editorconfig
  :hook (after-init . editorconfig-mode))
#+end_src

*** Swift
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package swift-mode
  :ensure t
  :mode "\\.swift\\'"
  :hook (swift-mode . flycheck-swift3-setup)
  :config
  (use-package flycheck-swift3
    :ensure t)
  (use-package lsp-sourcekit
    :ensure t
    :if
    (= 0 (call-process "which" nil nil nil "xcrun"))
    :after lsp-mode
    :config
    ;; configure the package to point to the sourcekit-lsp executable
    (setq lsp-sourcekit-executable (string-trim (shell-command-to-string "xcrun --find sourcekit-lsp")))
    (setq lsp-sourcekit-extra-args
          `("-Xswiftc" "-sdk"
            "-Xswiftc" ,(string-trim (shell-command-to-string "xcrun --sdk iphonesimulator --show-sdk-path"))
            "-Xswiftc" "-target"
            "-Xswiftc" ,(concat "arm64-apple-ios"
                                (string-trim (shell-command-to-string "xcrun --sdk iphonesimulator --show-sdk-version"))
                                "-simulator")))))
#+end_src

** org-mode:
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package org
  :init
  (defvar org-inline-image-overlays)
  :preface
  (declare-function org-redisplay-inline-images "org")
  (declare-function org-todo "org")
  (declare-function org-get-todo-state "org")
  (defun show-org-buffer (file)
    "Show an org-file FILE on the current buffer."
    (interactive)
    (if (get-buffer file)
        (let ((buffer (get-buffer file)))
          (switch-to-buffer buffer)
          (message "%s" file))
      (find-file (concat "~/Documents/Org/" file))))
  :hook
  ;; org-inline-image-overlays
  ;; https://github.com/xenodium/ob-swiftui#auto-refresh-results-file-image
  (org-babel-after-execute-hook . (lambda ()
                                    (when org-inline-image-overlays
                                      (org-redisplay-inline-images))))
  (org-clock-in-hook . (lambda nil
                         "Change status to DOING when clocking in"
                         (when (equal
                                (org-get-todo-state)
                                "TODO")
                           (org-todo "DOING"))))
  (org-clock-out-hook . (lambda nil
                          "Change status to DONE when clocking out"
                          (when (equal
                                 (org-get-todo-state)
                                 "DOING")
                            (org-todo "DONE"))))
  :custom
  ;; Enable speed commands
  (org-use-speed-commands t)
  ;; Press 'd' to mark task as DONE
  (org-speed-commands-user '(("d" org-todo "DONE")))
  ;; Defer org-babel language loading to avoid requiring all
  ;; language packages at startup (was 8% of startup time).
  ;; Languages are loaded on first org-babel-execute via advice.
  (org-babel-load-languages '((emacs-lisp . t)))
  ;; Skip babel confirmation only for files in trusted directories
  (org-confirm-babel-evaluate
   (lambda (lang _body)
     (let ((dominated (and buffer-file-name
                        (or (string-prefix-p (expand-file-name org-directory) (expand-file-name buffer-file-name))
                            (string-prefix-p (expand-file-name user-emacs-directory) (expand-file-name buffer-file-name))))))
       (not dominated))))
  ;; Wrap long lines
  (org-startup-truncated nil)
  ;; Display images inline
  (org-startup-with-inline-images t)
  ;; Remove extra asterisks from headings
  (org-hide-leading-stars t)
  (org-todo-keywords '((sequence "TODO" "DOING" "SOMEDAY" "|" "DONE(!)" "CLOSED")))
  ;; File location for org directory
  (org-directory "~/Documents/Org/")
  :bind
  ;; org-mode
  ;; (global-set-key (kbd "C-c p") 'org-preview-html-mode)
  ;; Open memo.org
  ("C-c m" . (lambda ()
               (interactive)
               (show-org-buffer "memo.org")))
  :config
  ;; Lazily load additional babel languages on first execute
  (defvar my/org-babel-extra-languages
    '((shell . t) (swift . t) (kotlin . t)
      (haskell . t) (python . t) (ruby . t)))
  (defvar my/org-babel-extra-loaded nil)
  (define-advice org-babel-execute-src-block (:before (&rest _) lazy-load-languages)
    (unless my/org-babel-extra-loaded
      (org-babel-do-load-languages
       'org-babel-load-languages
       (append org-babel-load-languages my/org-babel-extra-languages))
      (setq my/org-babel-extra-loaded t)
      (advice-remove 'org-babel-execute-src-block 'org-babel-execute-src-block@lazy-load-languages))))
#+end_src

*** org-capture
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package org-capture
  :custom
  ;; Org-capture templates
  ;;
  ;; Template expansion
  ;; https://orgmode.org/manual/Template-expansion.html#Template-expansion
  ;;
  ;; %t: timestamp (date only)
  ;; %T: timestamp (date and time)
  ;; %u: inactive timestamp (date only) - inactive timestamps do not affect agenda
  ;; %U: inactive timestamp (date and time)
  ;; %?: cursor position after template completion
  ;; %i: the selected region when capture is invoked with region active
  (org-capture-templates '(
                             ("m"
                              "💡 Memo"
                              entry
                              (file+olp+datetree "~/Documents/Org/memo.org")
                              "* %?\n  %i\n  ")
                             (
                              "t"
                              "✅︎ To Do" entry
                              (file+headline "~/Documents/Org/task.org" "Task")
                              "* TODO %?\nat %U")))
  :bind
  ("C-c c" . 'org-capture))
#+end_src

*** org-agenda
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package org-agenda
  :custom
  (org-agenda-files '("~/Documents/Org/"))
  (calendar-holidays nil)
  (org-agenda-format-date "%+4Y/%0m/%0d (%a)")
  :bind
  ("C-c a" . 'org-agenda))

(use-package org-super-agenda
  :ensure t
  :hook (org-agenda-mode . org-super-agenda-mode)
  :custom
  ;; https://github.com/alphapapa/org-super-agenda/blob/master/examples.org#zaen323
  (org-agenda-time-grid '((daily today require-timed)
                            "----------------------" nil))
  (org-agenda-skip-scheduled-if-done t)
  (org-agenda-skip-deadline-if-done t)
  (org-agenda-include-deadlines t)
  (org-agenda-include-diary t)
  (org-agenda-block-separator nil)
  (org-agenda-compact-blocks t)
  (org-agenda-start-with-log-mode t)
  (org-agenda-custom-commands
   '(("z" "📌 struuuuggle view"
      ((agenda "" ((org-agenda-span 'day)
                   (org-super-agenda-groups
                    '((:name "Today"
                             :time-grid t
                             :date today
                             :todo "TODAY"
                             :scheduled today
                             :order 1)))))
       (alltodo "" ((org-agenda-overriding-header "")
                    (org-super-agenda-groups
                     '((:name "Next to do"
                              :todo "NEXT"
                              :order 1)
                       (:name "Important"
                              :priority "A"
                              :order 6)
                       (:name "Due Today"
                              :deadline today
                              :order 2)
                       (:name "Due Soon"
                              :deadline future
                              :order 8)
                       (:name "Overdue"
                              :deadline past
                              :order 7)
                       (:name "Waiting"
                              :todo "WAITING"
                              :order 20))))))))))
#+end_src

** projectile
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package projectile
  :ensure t
  :blackout t
  :preface
  (declare-function projectile-project-name "projectile")
  :custom
  (projectile-switch-project-action
   (lambda ()
     (let ((tab-bar-new-tab-choice nil)) ;; Temporarily suppress dashboard startup
       (tab-new))
     (tab-bar-rename-tab (projectile-project-name))
     (magit-status)))
  (projectile-verbose nil)
  (projectile-completion-system 'default)
  :hook (after-init . projectile-mode)
  :config
  (defvar projectile-project-search-path)
  (if noninteractive
      (setq projectile-project-search-path nil)
    (setq projectile-project-search-path '("~/sandbox/" ("~/ghq/" . 3))))
  (use-package rg
    :if (executable-find "rg")
    :ensure t)
  (use-package projectile-rails
    :ensure t)
  :bind (:map projectile-mode-map
              ("s-p" . projectile-command-map)
              ("C-c p" . projectile-command-map)
              ("s-O" . projectile-find-file)))
#+end_src

** shell
*** PATH
We don't have to use [[https://github.com/purcell/exec-path-from-shell][exec-path-from-shell]] anymore.
See also [[https://github.com/d12frosted/homebrew-emacs-plus?tab=readme-ov-file#injected-path][homebrew-emacs-plus#README]].

*** vterm
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package vterm
  :ensure t
  :preface
  (define-prefix-command 'vterm-prefix-map)
  (declare-function vterm-send-key "vterm")
  (defun send-backspace nil
    "Send a backspace character to vterm process."
    (interactive)
    (vterm-send-key (kbd "C-h")))
  (defun vterm-new ()
    "Create a new vterm buffer with a unique name."
    (interactive)
    (vterm t))
  (defun vterm-split-below ()
    "Split window below and open a new vterm."
    (interactive)
    (split-window-below)
    (other-window 1)
    (vterm t))
  (defun vterm-split-right ()
    "Split window right and open a new vterm."
    (interactive)
    (split-window-right)
    (other-window 1)
    (vterm t))
  :custom
  (vterm-shell "/bin/zsh")
  (vterm-kill-buffer-on-exit t)
  (vterm-buffer-name-string "vterm: %s")
  (vterm-keymap-exceptions '("C-'" "C-x" "C-c" "C-o" "M-x"))
  ;; Do not prompt to confirm vterm processes when exiting Emacs
  (confirm-kill-processes nil)
  :config
  (use-package vterm-toggle
    :ensure t
    :custom
    (vterm-toggle-scope 'project))
  (add-hook 'vterm-mode-hook
            (lambda nil
              (local-set-key (kbd "C-h") #'send-backspace)))
  ;; (add-to-list 'vterm-eval-cmds '("update-pwd" (lambda (path) (setq default-directory path))))
  :bind-keymap ("C-c v" . vterm-prefix-map)
  :bind (:map vterm-prefix-map
              ("v" . vterm-toggle)
              ("n" . vterm-new)
              ("|" . vterm-split-right)
              ("-" . vterm-split-below)))
#+end_src

** Agents
[[https://github.com/xenodium/agent-shell][agent-shell]]: A native Emacs buffer to interact with LLM agents powered by ACP
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(use-package agent-shell
    :if (and (eq system-type 'darwin)
             (fboundp 'use-package-ensure-system-package-exists?))
    :ensure t
    :ensure-system-package
    ;; Add agent installation configs here
    ((codex . "brew install codex")
     (codex-acp . "npm install -g @zed-industries/codex-acp")
     (claude . "brew install claude-code")
     (claude-agent-acp . "npm install -g @zed-industries/claude-agent-acp")
     (gemini . "brew install gemini-cli")))

(use-package agent-shell
  :if (and (eq system-type 'darwin)
           (not (fboundp 'use-package-ensure-system-package-exists?)))
  :ensure t)
#+end_src


** keybind
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(global-set-key "\C-h" 'delete-backward-char)
;; alias of "M-g M-g"
(global-set-key "\M-g" 'goto-line)
(global-set-key (kbd "s-/") 'comment-line)
(global-set-key "\M-;" 'comment-line)
(global-set-key "\C-c\C-x" 'eval-buffer)
(global-set-key (kbd "C-x k") 'kill-current-buffer)
(global-set-key (kbd "s-w") 'kill-current-buffer)
(global-set-key (kbd "s-z") 'undo)
(global-set-key (kbd "s-Z") 'undo-redo)
(global-set-key (kbd "s-[") 'tab-bar-switch-to-prev-tab)
(global-set-key (kbd "s-]") 'tab-bar-switch-to-next-tab)
(global-set-key (kbd "s-{") 'tab-bar-switch-to-prev-tab)
(global-set-key (kbd "s-}") 'tab-bar-switch-to-next-tab)
#+end_src

** Package quickstart
Regenerate =package-quickstart.el= after any package operation so that
the next startup can skip the expensive =package-activate-all= scan.
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(advice-add 'package-install   :after (lambda (&rest _) (package-quickstart-refresh)))
(advice-add 'package-delete    :after (lambda (&rest _) (package-quickstart-refresh)))
(advice-add 'package-upgrade   :after (lambda (&rest _) (package-quickstart-refresh)))
(advice-add 'package-upgrade-all :after (lambda (&rest _) (package-quickstart-refresh)))
#+end_src

** deinit
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
(defun my/reset-gc-threshold ()
  "Restore GC settings after startup."
  (setq gc-cons-threshold 16777216
        gc-cons-percentage 0.1)
  (garbage-collect))
(add-hook 'emacs-startup-hook #'my/reset-gc-threshold)
#+end_src

** Footer
#+begin_src emacs-lisp :lexical no :results silent
;;; init.el ends here
#+end_src
